_comment: Copy this file to seed_admin_creds.json (gitignored). On every startup the API will create the super admins listed below in an auto-created '__platform__' organization. The 'username' can be any string (e.g. 'sadmin' or 'admin@company.com'); it is what the user types at the login screen. Passwords must be >= 8 chars. Add "force_reset_password": true to overwrite a user's password on the next startup. Create real organizations and their admins via the Admin page in the UI (or POST /api/auth/super-admin/organizations).
